recommended_actions.title: Try Bike Commute Once a Week
recommended_actions.description: Replace a 10km car ride with a bicycle or electric scooter commute.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Commuting by bike produces 100% zero tailpipe emissions and improves cardiovascular health.

recommended_actions.title: Introduce a Meatless Monday
recommended_actions.description: Shift for a whole day to vegetarian meals containing zero red meat.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Red meat is one of the highest contributors to household climate footprints due to land land-use and methane emissions.

recommended_actions.title: Lower Thermostat by 1°C
recommended_actions.description: Slightly reduce heating temperature or adjust air-conditioning levels by 1°C.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Climate control accounts for over 50% of typical home energy bills. A small adjustment scales down grid demand directly.

chat_messages.content: Hello! I am your Leafstep Climate Coach. I can help you understand your footprint, suggest ways to save carbon, and automatically track your daily activities. Ask me anything, or say 'Coach, log a 15km EV drive' to try automated logging!
